feature.title: RWA Yield Expansion Research (Arbitrum environmental and solar assets)

notes: Research-first backlog item for Arbitrum environmental and solar yield assets.
No contract, shared hook, admin, or client implementation should start until asset source, custody/compliance boundary, yield path, risk model, and proof requirements are locked.
The older Conservative/Balanced preset plan remains historical context only; do not treat it as current build-ready execution order.
Afo deferred this out of active product work on 2026-04-26. Keep as June implementation/backlog, not part of the April closeout push.

ui.handoff_note: No UI implementation lane is active while this hub is research-first. Reopen only after the Arbitrum environmental/solar asset research locks an implementation boundary.

state_api.handoff_note: No shared state/API implementation lane is active while this hub is research-first. Reopen only after asset data contracts, yield path, and risk/proof requirements are agreed.

contracts.handoff_note: No contract implementation lane is active while this hub is research-first. Do not start adapters, preset registries, or queue contracts until the Arbitrum environmental/solar asset path is validated.

qa_pass_1.handoff_note: No QA lane is active while this hub is research-first. Add QA once a concrete implementation plan is promoted.

qa_pass_2.handoff_note: No second QA lane is active while this hub is research-first. Add validation once a concrete implementation plan is promoted.

history.note: Hub created from superpowers spec + plan. Epic #463; outcome milestone #13. 12 decisions locked: policy-layer-on-top approach, Conservative + Balanced Q2 scope, immutable presets, on-flow + Gelato rebalance, 48h switch timelock, 14-day emergency-withdraw gate, external audit before 2026-05-30 contract freeze, 95%+ mutation score on RebalancePolicy.

brief.md + eval.md + status.json scaffolded; spec.md migrated from docs/superpowers/specs/ (legacy folder deleted). plan.todo.md spec link rewired to ./spec.md. Audit engagement bundled with agent-messaging-channels SessionKeyValidator. plan-hub.mjs validate green.
Moved feature hub from active to backlog
Reset Linear framing to Research parent RESR-9 around Arbitrum environmental and solar yield assets; implementation lanes are not active until research locks asset/proof boundaries.
Moved feature hub from backlog to ideas
Moved to ideas and neutralized lane mirroring until activation.
